channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Birx to Newsmax: Cruise Passengers Should Get Hantavirus PCR Tests
item.description: Former White House coronavirus response coordinator Dr. Deborah Birx on Saturday said health officials should use modern testing technology to monitor...

item.title: Peace? Putin Indicates Russo-Ukraine War Now 'Moving Toward Completion'
Will Nigel Farage and Reform UK Make Britain Great Again?
Trump warns college sports could be ‘lost forever’ as committee pushes changes, Congress urged to act
item.description: President Trump ramps up pressure on Congress to overhaul college sports, warning the system faces an out-of-control financial arms race ahead.
